mapper.select: select sum(amount) as amount from agent_deposit_subordinates where created_time between #{beginTime} and #{endTime} and user_account in (select user_account from user_info where account_type in (2,3) and super_agent_account in (select agent_account from agent_info where agent_type in (1,2)))

select user_account from agent_deposit_subordinates where created_time between #{beginTime} and #{endTime} and user_account in (select user_account from user_info where account_type in (2,3) and super_agent_account in (select agent_account from agent_info where agent_type in (1,2)))
